title: Ubiquiti UP-Chime - Smart Chime
description: The smart doorbell from the UniFi Protect family by Ubiquiti wirelessly connects to your existing WiFi network and then pairs with existing UniFi Protect Doorbells without pulling additional cables . The doorbell is powered directly from a 230 V AC outlet and is supported in the UniFi Protect application from version 2.0 (web)/1.6.2 (iOS) or 1.6.0 (android)
specsSearch: Wireless features WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Type of antenna Built-in Antenna gain [dBi] 2 Connectors and Interfaces Audio Speaker Power Power type Mains power (230V) Max. power consumption [W] 3,7 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC (directly to the wall outlet)
